subject: english
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: State the uses of a dictionary
Identify the information a dictionary entry can provide
Apply dictionary skills to selected words

sections.heading: Uses of the Dictionary
sections.content: The dictionary is used for meaning, spelling, pronunciation, usage, stress, collocation, transcription, and parts of speech.

sections.heading: Sample Entry
sections.content: The note uses 'abuse' to show noun and verb word classes, transcription, meaning, and collocation such as drug abuse, alcohol abuse, and substance abuse.
